name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Long Beach, CA residents visit 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2160 Long Beach Blvd for quick car title loans, open 9AM-7PM weekdays and 10AM-5PM Saturday.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans in Long Beach, CA is located at 2160 Long Beach Blvd, a convenient storefront for locals seeking car title loan services. The Long Beach branch operates Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, and Saturday from 10AM to 5PM (closed Sundays). This location serves Long Beach residents looking for quick, accessible title loan options.

At this Long Beach location, you can apply for car title loans directly by phone at +1 562-667-3658 or by visiting in person. The staff can explain loan terms, document requirements, and next steps for getting cash against your vehicle's title. Whether you need emergency funds or have been turned down elsewhere, this Long Beach branch provides personalized service.

If you're a Long Beach, CA resident facing a cash crunch, bring a valid government ID, proof of address, and your vehicle's title when you visit. The process is typically quick, and funds may be available same-day. 5 Star Car Title Loans specializes in car title loans for borrowers with credit challenges.
address: 2160 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90806

company_info.headquarters: 2160 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90806

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000, allowing access to larger emergency cash than typical payday loans
Borrowers keep possession and use of their vehicle while the title serves as collateral
No prepayment penalties, allowing early repayment without additional fees
Accepts alternative collateral including motorcycle and semi-truck titles, not just cars
Licensed and regulated lender operating since 2012 with 255K+ loans funded
No credit check required; accessible to borrowers with poor or no credit history
Fast approval process with decisions reported within minutes
cons: APR and interest rates not disclosed on website, making true borrowing costs unclear
Title loans typically carry extremely high interest rates (often 100–300% APR depending on state)
Limited to nearly 18 states; significant geographic restrictions on availability
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan payments are missed or defaulted
No information provided about loan-to-value ratios, fees, or default consequences
best_for: Borrowers with poor or no credit history who need emergency cash and have vehicle equity
Vehicle owners facing immediate financial emergencies (medical, rent, utilities) who want to keep their car
People ineligible for traditional bank loans or personal loans but with valuable vehicle collateral
Borrowers in states served by 5 Star who need larger emergency amounts ($5,000–$50,000)
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for vehicle owners in emergency financial situations who have equity in their cars and cannot qualify for traditional loans. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost borrowing products with APRs typically exceeding 100%, and default risk includes vehicle repossession—borrowers should exhaust all other options and understand state-specific regulations before proceeding.
services: Vehicle title loans up to $50,000 with flexible repayment terms
Motorcycle title loans accepting alternative vehicle collateral
Semi-truck title loans and commercial vehicle financing
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments and terms up to 24 months
Same-day cash loans for urgent expenses
In-person loan applications at physical locations
Secure application with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption
No-credit-check loans accessible to borrowers with poor credit
Same-day or expedited funding and cash pickup
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2160 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA. Quick car title loans with same-day options available.
